allow: Bash(dd bs=1 count=500 echo "" echo "---" curl -s -I "http://localhost:3000/api/health")

Bash(git commit -m 'Document remaining critical issues found *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Remove duplicate/unused directories - clean up mess *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Final architecture simplification - one site, right endpoints *)

Bash(git commit -m 'Complete architecture audit and planning for cleanup *)

Bash(export DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5432 DB_USER=stocks DB_PASSWORD=<set_in_env> DB_NAME=stocks DB_SSL=false)

PowerShell($headers = @{"Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json"}; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/argie33/algo/actions/workflows/deploy-app-stocks.yml/runs?per_page=1" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $run = $json.workflow_runs[0]; @{ status = $run.status; conclusion = $run.conclusion; name = $run.name; created_at = $run.created_at; updated_at = $run.updated_at; job_count = $run.total_count } | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($headers = @{"Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json"}; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/argie33/algo/actions/workflows/deploy-app-stocks.yml/runs?per_page=1" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $run_id = $json.workflow_runs[0].id; $jobs_response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/argie33/algo/actions/runs/$run_id/jobs" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $jobs_json = $jobs_response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $jobs_json.jobs | Select-Object name, status, conclusion, @{Name="completed_at"; Expression={$_.completed_at}} | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($headers = @{"Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json"}; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/argie33/algo/actions/workflows/deploy-app-stocks.yml/runs?per_page=1" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $run_id = $json.workflow_runs[0].id; $jobs_response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/argie33/algo/actions/runs/$run_id/jobs" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $jobs_json = $jobs_response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $infra_job = $jobs_json.jobs | Where-Object {$_.name -eq "Deploy Infrastructure"}; $logs_url = $infra_job.logs_url; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $logs_url -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | Select-Object -Last 3000)

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $token = $env:GITHUB_TOKEN; if \(-not $token\) { "No GITHUB_TOKEN in environment" } else { "Token found, fetching workflow runs..."; $headers = @{"Authorization" = "token $token"; "Accept" = "application/vnd.github+json"}; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/argie33/algo/actions/workflows/deploy-app-stocks.yml/runs?per_page=1" -Headers $headers; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $run = $json.workflow_runs[0]; "Latest run: $\($run.id\)"; "Status: $\($run.status\)"; "Conclusion: $\($run.conclusion\)"; "Created: $\($run.created_at\)"; "Updated: $\($run.updated_at\)" })
